notes.f1: Clarence Reese recovered and linked as a sibling, from the 1880 Louis Reese census household.
notes.f2: Elizabeth Jane recovered as 'Lizzie Reese' (b. 1876) and linked, from the 1880 census household.
notes.f3: Lewis Reese (b. 7 Oct 1878) recovered and linked, from the 1880 census household.
notes.f9: Emily Reese (b. 28 Mar 1892) recovered and linked (bonus) — the one later-born sibling it reached before the cost cap.
notes.f4: Lora not recovered — the run hit the per-run cost cap (stop_reason cost_cap) before enumerating the post-1880 siblings.
notes.f8: Richard not recovered — cost cap cut the enumeration short. Note: the agent also encoded a spurious sibling 'Burr Reese' who is not among Lewis Reese's actual children (likely a census mis-read); proof honestly tiered 'probable / exhaustiveness partial'.
